hooks.command: cd "$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)" || exit 1 && AGE=$(($(date +%s) - $(git log -1 --format=%ct))) && [ "$AGE" -ge 90 ] && git add -A && (git diff --staged --quiet || (FILES=$(git diff --staged --name-only | head -5 | tr '\n' ' ' | sed 's/ $//') && git commit -m "chore(auto): $FILES")) || exit 0
